title: Portugal Attractions Guide
description: Key attractions and activities for the trip

attractions.name: Livraria Lello
attractions.description: One of the world's most beautiful bookstores. Inspiration for Harry Potter.
attractions.tips: Book timed entry tickets in advance. Go early to avoid crowds.

attractions.name: Convento de Cristo
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage monastery complex of the Knights Templar.
attractions.tips: Allow 2-3 hours. Round church (Charola) is the highlight.

attractions.name: Quinta da Regaleira
attractions.description: Gothic palace with mysterious Initiation Well and enchanted gardens.
attractions.tips: Book morning slot. Wear comfortable shoes for exploring.

attractions.name: Pena Palace
attractions.description: Colorful Romanticist castle on a hilltop with stunning views.
attractions.tips: Combo ticket with Moorish Castle saves money. Take shuttle bus from parking.

attractions.name: Benagil Cave
attractions.description: Iconic sea cave with natural skylight. Catamaran tour from Portimão.
attractions.tips: BOOK EARLY - sells out in August! Morning departure recommended.

attractions.name: Lagos Old Town & Ponta da Piedade
attractions.description: Historic walled town and dramatic cliff formations with golden grottos.
attractions.tips: Walk the cliff path at sunset. Stop for pastéis de nata.

attractions.name: Belém Tower & Jerónimos Monastery
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage sites from Portugal's Age of Discovery.
attractions.tips: Arrive at golden hour (6-7 PM) for best photos without crowds.
